subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Most Glorious! Today, whosoever serveth the loved ones of God is verily a servant of the Abhá Beauty and a prince [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم ابهی الیوم هرکس خدمت احباء الله نماید خادم جمال ابهی است و امیر در
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @service to others; to the Cause of God
